Western in Westminster

Alongside my regular duties in Westminster, I am a member  of the International Trade Committee, which scrutinises the Government’s trade plans. I am also a member of various All Party Parliamentary Groups, including the APPGs on Students, Video Games, Sikhs, Hindus, and Climate Change. I chair the APPGs on Motor, Electric Vehicles, and Council Housing.

To look at my voting record, please go to: https://www.theyworkforyou.com/mp/25701/matt_western/warwick_and_leamington/recent

Below you can view all my speeches and questions in Parliament.

Matt Western MP raises the Rosalind Franklin Laboratory failures with the Health Secretary

Matt Western MP eviscerates the Government’s so-called Freedom of Speech Bill

Matt Western MP criticises the Government’s economic record

Matt Western MP raises flats with no affordable homes in Leamington

Matt Western MP reacts to the Queen’s Speech

Matt Western MP calls on the Government to provide safe routes for unaccompanied Ukrainian children

Matt Western MP reminds the Government of the importance of Channel 4

PM’s India trip meeting records needed to hold him to account

MPs must vote to investigate Boris Johnson after Partygate scandal
